steps.title: Restrict the sample space
steps.content: Given at least $10$ years of age, count only those rows: $40+40=80$ participants.

steps.title: Count group A
steps.content: In those rows, group A has $18+7=25$ participants.

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content: The conditional probability is $$ \frac{25}{80}=\frac{5}{16} $$ The answer is B.
